title: Unnai Kandane Mudhal Murai Lyrics Parijatham
stanzas:
Unnai Kandane Mudhal Murai Song Lyrics Parijatham
#DharanKumar #Haricharan

unnai kandane
muthal murai
naan ennai thulaithene
muttrilumai thaan

kaathal bhoothamey
ennai neeyum thottai
hayyo hayayo.
achcham varuthey
thappichellave valigal
illai inge
hayyo hayayo..
chee enavo panninaai neeye

unnai kandane
muthal murai
naan ennai thulaithene
muttrilumai thaan

Erikkira mazhai idhu
kulirgira veyil idhu
kothikira neer idhu
anaikira thee idhu
inikira vali idhu
iruamuzha poo idhu
ithayathil malarvadhu
o penne

nijamulle poi idhu
niramulle iruttidhu
mounathin mozhi idhu
maranathin vaazh idhu
andharathin kadal idhu
kanthirantha kanavidhu
ahimsayil kovadhu
kaezh penne

enginen naan thenginen
yenada podhum imsaigal
vaanamum intha bhoomiyum
unthan thotrame
un per sonaale
ulle thithukkume

kaathal kaditham
adhu konjam pesum
kannodu irukkum
pala kaditham

penne naanum
un kannai padipen
puriyamal thavithen
poi sollutho
meyi sollutho

o kaathal enai
thaakiduthey
seri thaan enayum
adhu saayithiduthe

iravil kanavum
ennai saapiduthe
pothuvaai vayathil
idhil thappikke
yaarum illaiye
unnai kandene ..

eno iravil oru
padal kaettaal
udane yen ulle
nee varuvaai

koyil ulle
kan mudi nindraai
un uruvam thaane
enaalumenenjil thondrume

naan unaalthaan
swasikiren
naan unper
dhinam vaasikiren

uyirai vidavum
unai nesikiren
kadavul nilayai
namm kannile
kaattidum kaathal

unnai kandane
muthal murai
naan ennai thulaithene
muttrilumai thaan

kaathal bhoothamey
ennai neeyum thottai
hayyo hayayo.
achcham varuthey
thappichellave valigal
illai inge
hayyo hayayo..
chee enavo panninaai neeye

Erikkira mazhai idhu
kulirgira veyil idhu
kothikira neer idhu
anaikira thee idhu
inikira vali idhu
iruamuzha poo idhu
ithayathil malarvadhu
o penne

nijamulle poi idhu
niramulle iruttidhu
mounathin mozhi idhu
maranathin vaazh idhu
andharathin kadal idhu
kanthirantha kanavidhu
ahimsayil kovadhu
kaezh penne

enginen naan thaenginen
yenada podhum imsaigal
vaanamum intha bhoomiyum
unthan thotrame
un per sonaale
ulle thithukkume

maanasukull yedho sol sol
edhirinil vandhu nill nill
uyirukkul yedho jal jal
idhu sarithaanaa nee sol

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between the lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Parijatham, this song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Haricharan and Shruthi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Unnai Kandane Mudhal Murai was composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was this song released?

This song was released on June 9, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unnai Kandane Mudhal Murai, the romantic essence of love is beautifully portrayed through the soulful voices of Haricharan and Shruthi. The song encapsulates the emotions of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Its soothing melody, composed by Dharan Kumar, resonates with listeners, evoking feelings of warmth and connection. This enchanting duet is a highlight in the Parijatham movie, enhancing the romantic narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unnai Kandane Mudhal Murai from the Parijatham movie is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Haricharan and Shruthi's enchanting vocals, this song is a perfect blend of romance and soothing melodies. Experience the magic of Dharan Kumar's composition that resonates with heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: The first time I saw you, I felt like I was drowning in you.
Love is a ghost that touches me, oh my! Fear and anxiety are here, there are no paths. Oh my! What have you done?
The rain is falling, the sun is shining, the water is flowing, the fire is burning, the pain is here, the flower blooms in my heart, oh girl.
The first time I saw you, I felt like I was drowning in you.
The rain is falling, the sun is shining, the water is flowing, the fire is burning, the pain is here, the flower blooms in my heart, oh girl.
This is the truth, it is dark in color. Silence is the language, this is the life of death, this is the ocean of the world, this is the vision of the beloved, oh girl, do not be angry.
Where am I going, what am I doing? The sky and this earth are your garden, when I call your name, I feel it inside.
Love messages that speak a little, many messages are there with the eyes.
Oh girl, I will read your eyes, without understanding, I have gone away, did you say the truth or a lie?
Oh love, you have taken me away, it is true, it has consumed me.
In the night, dreams feed me, generally, there is no one to blame in this hunger.
I saw you...
If I hear a song in the night, you will come to me immediately.
You are the one who stands in the temple, your form is what I see, even if I think about it.
I breathe for you, I live for your name every day.
I love you so much that I will give my life for you, God shows love in our eyes.
The first time I saw you, I felt like I was drowning in you.
Love is a ghost that touches me, oh my! Fear and anxiety are here, there are no paths. Oh my! What have you done?
The rain is falling, the sun is shining, the water is flowing, the fire is burning, the pain is here, the flower blooms in my heart, oh girl.
This is the truth, it is dark in color. Silence is the language, this is the life of death, this is the ocean of the world, this is the vision of the beloved, oh girl, do not be angry.
Where am I going, what am I doing? The sky and this earth are your garden, when I call your name, I feel it inside.
Something is there in the mind, it comes and stands in opposition, something is there in life, is it flowing? You tell me.
